pick_implementation.title: Connect DIYHome
pick_implementation.description: Log in to your DIYHome account to add your smart home devices to Home Assistant.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate DIYHome
reauth_confirm.description: Your DIYHome session has expired. Log in again to restore the connection.

abort.missing_configuration: Unable to start OAuth flow. Please restart Home Assistant and try again.

create_entry.default: DIYHome connected successfully. Your devices are now available in Home Assistant.
